basic.label: Basic
basic.description: Fundamental achievements that help you start your journey

achievements.name: First Claim
achievements.description: Claim your very first card.

achievements.name: Collector
achievements.description: Claim 25 cards.

achievements.name: Gifter
achievements.description: Send a gift to another player.

achievements.name: Adventurer
achievements.description: Complete 25 expeditions.

achievements.name: Claim Hoarder
achievements.description: Claim 1000 cards total.

achievements.name: Gift God
achievements.description: Send 50 total gifts to other players.

achievements.name: Expedition Veteran
achievements.description: Complete 500 expeditions.

achievements.name: Awakened
achievements.description: Reach Awakening level 5 on any one card.
